what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-source channel, linking it to a specific deck slide image target.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-source/deck1-2026/p-02
No body content beyond the frontmatter
standouts: Uses a channel-memory attachment file to reference an image asset by URI
conventions: image:// URI scheme for asset targets
notes: This is a lightweight ledger entry that records when an image attachment was added and where it points.
questions: Is the image:// URI resolvable by the consuming system?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches actual: it records an image attachment reference with provenance metadata.
intention_signals: To create a discoverable, timestamped record associating a design-channel attachment with a specific image asset.
contribution: Provides a stable, identifiable attachment record that links a channel to an external image asset via a URI and captures when it was added.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file referencing an image asset in the design-source channel.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment for a design source deck slide with provenance timestamp.
